Magic number: InlineData(4) is a bare literal mid-range value for CoachLevel (1-8 range). It is not self-documenting.
suggestedFix: Add 'public const int MidRangeCoachLevel = 4;' to Team class and use Team.MidRangeCoachLevel, OR add an inline comment: [InlineData(4 /* midpoint of 1..8 range */)]
